channel.title: Slow Route Journal
channel.description: Fresh takes for slow-travel and low-impact explorers.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in packing with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest packing adjustments that slow-travel and low-impact explorers report mattering most.

item.title: Beyond Peak: Mastering the Art of Rail Scheduling
item.description: Optimize your rail travel with off-peak booking strategies.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your rail in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying rail project for slow-travel — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the local community this week.

item.description: Ditch the plane for a more relaxed ride

item.title: "carry on packing list" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about carry on packing list through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.
